scripts.dev: npm run dev:server & npm run dev:client
scripts.typecheck: npm -w apps/client run typecheck && npm -w apps/server run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm -w apps/client run lint && npm -w apps/server run lint
scripts.build: npm -w apps/server run build && npm -w apps/client run build
scripts.test: npm -w apps/server run test && npm -w apps/client run test
